title: CreateTimeEntryRequest
description: Request body for creating a manual time entry.

tid.description: The task ID to associate with the time entry.

start.description: Start time as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

stop.description: Stop time as Unix timestamp in milliseconds. If omitted, duration is used to calculate the end time.

assignee.description: User ID to assign the time entry to.

billable.description: Whether the time entry is billable.

tags.description: Tags to associate with the time entry.
